<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please check everything that applies. -->

- [ ] I ran `pnpm check && pnpm test` and everything passes
- [ ] I ran `cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` and everything passes
- [ ] I added or updated a fixture that demonstrates the change
- [ ] I documented any privacy or replay-semantics impact in the PR description
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or real customer data in test fixtures
